text:
is a Scout Regiment soldier.

Appearance

Oruo has curly, light brown hair styled in an undercut and brown eyes. He wears the standard Scout Regiment uniform, as well as a white cravat and a black shirt.

Story

During one of his attempts to get closer to his subordinates, Erwin approaches Oruo and Petra, which cramp them. Later, after his makeover, Erwin meets Oruo and his teammates again but they are all uneasy and report their Commander's behavior to Levi.
